[FIELD] default_currency (VARCHAR) | [TABLE] tabSupplier | [DESC] Supplier default currency; not the loss metric.
[FIELD] default_commission_rate (DECIMAL) | [TABLE] tabCustomer | [DESC] Commission rate; unrelated to forex loss.
[FIELD] is_frozen (INT) | [TABLE] tabSupplier | [DESC] Supplier frozen flag; not related to forex loss.
[FIELD] asset_category (VARCHAR) | [TABLE] tabItem | [DESC] Fixed asset classification; irrelevant.
[FIELD] is_fixed_asset (INT) | [TABLE] tabItem | [DESC] Fixed asset flag; unrelated.

[FIELD] base_rounding_adjustment (DECIMAL(21,9)) | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | [DESC] Base rounding adjustment on purchase order; not forex loss.
[FIELD] disable_rounded_total (INT(1)) | [TABLE] tabPurchase Receipt | [DESC] Rounding toggle; not relevant.
[FIELD] is_old_subcontracting_flow (INT(1)) | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | [DESC] Old flow flag; not related.
[FIELD] other_charges_calculation (LONGTEXT) | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | [DESC] Other charges calculation metadata; unrelated to forex loss.

[FIELD] smallest_currency_fraction_value (DECIMAL(21,9)) | [TABLE] tabCurrency | [DESC] Minimum fraction value; not used for loss aggregation.

[FIELD] name (VARCHAR) | [TABLE] tabCurrency | [DESC] Currency code; useful for currency itself but not necessary to sum forex loss here.

[FIELD] debit (DECIMAL) | [TABLE] tabGL Entry | [DESC] Debit amount recorded for foreign exchange loss entries.
[FIELD] credit (DECIMAL) | [TABLE] tabGL Entry | [DESC] Credit amount recorded for foreign exchange gain entries.
[FIELD] account (VARCHAR) | [TABLE] tabGL Entry | [DESC] Ledger account affected by FX gain or loss.
[TABLE] tabAccount | [DESC] Chart of Accounts master identifying FX gain/loss accounts through account_type and root_type.
[FIELD] account_type (VARCHAR) | [TABLE] tabAccount | [DESC] Identifies accounts such as 'Exchange Gain/Loss' or 'Foreign Currency Adjustment'.
[FIELD] root_type (VARCHAR) | [TABLE] tabAccount | [DESC] Indicates whether the account belongs to Income or Expense for loss calculation.
negatives: [FIELD] unrealized_profit_loss_account (VARCHAR) | [TABLE] tabSales Invoice | [DESC] Account used for unrealized P&L mapping; not the actual forex loss amount.
[FIELD] unrealized_profit_loss_account (VARCHAR) | [TABLE] tabPurchase Invoice | [DESC] Unrealized FX gain/loss account mapping; not the numeric loss value.
[FIELD] total_taxes_and_charges (DECIMAL(21,9)) | [TABLE] tabPayment Entry | [DESC] Total taxes and charges; unrelated to forex difference.
[FIELD] default_currency (VARCHAR) | [TABLE] tabCustomer | [DESC] Customer default currency; not the forex loss amount.
[FIELD] default_bank_account (VARCHAR) | [TABLE] tabCustomer | [DESC] Default bank account; not relevant to forex difference.
[FIELD] default_currency (VARCHAR) | [TABLE] tabSupplier | [DESC] Supplier default currency; not the loss metric.
[FIELD] default_commission_rate (DECIMAL) | [TABLE] tabCustomer | [DESC] Commission rate; unrelated to forex loss.
[FIELD] is_frozen (INT) | [TABLE] tabSupplier | [DESC] Supplier frozen flag; not related to forex loss.
[FIELD] asset_category (VARCHAR) | [TABLE] tabItem | [DESC] Fixed asset classification; irrelevant.
[FIELD] is_fixed_asset (INT) | [TABLE] tabItem | [DESC] Fixed asset flag; unrelated.
[FIELD] conversion_rate (DECIMAL(21,9)) | [TABLE] tabPurchase Receipt | [DESC] Purchase receipt exchange rate; not where forex loss is typically accumulated for payments.
[FIELD] rounding_adjustment (DECIMAL(21,9)) | [TABLE] tabPurchase Receipt | [DESC] Round-off adjustment; not forex difference.
[FIELD] base_rounding_adjustment (DECIMAL(21,9)) | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | [DESC] Base rounding adjustment on purchase order; not forex loss.
[FIELD] disable_rounded_total (INT(1)) | [TABLE] tabPurchase Receipt | [DESC] Rounding toggle; not relevant.
[FIELD] is_old_subcontracting_flow (INT(1)) | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | [DESC] Old flow flag; not related.
[FIELD] other_charges_calculation (LONGTEXT) | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | [DESC] Other charges calculation metadata; unrelated to forex loss.
[FIELD] fraction_units (INT) | [TABLE] tabCurrency | [DESC] Fraction units per currency; not the loss amount.
[FIELD] smallest_currency_fraction_value (DECIMAL(21,9)) | [TABLE] tabCurrency | [DESC] Minimum fraction value; not used for loss aggregation.
[FIELD] enabled (INT) | [TABLE] tabCurrency | [DESC] Currency active flag; not relevant.
[FIELD] modified (DATETIME) | [TABLE] tabCurrency | [DESC] Metadata on currency row; unrelated.
[FIELD] modified_by (VARCHAR) | [TABLE] tabCurrency | [DESC] Who modified the currency row; not used in forex loss queries.
[FIELD] name (VARCHAR) | [TABLE] tabCurrency | [DESC] Currency code; useful for currency itself but not necessary to sum forex loss here.
